uncooked-sifnos-almonds-fasting-argiro.name: Uncooked Sifnos Almonds (fasting)

ingredients.item: A little flower water for the molding.
A little flower water for the molding.

instructions: Add the sugar to a large pot with a thick base.
In medium heat and with a wooden spoon, mix the ingredients until the sugar melts and becomes syrup.
Add the ground almond paste and with the wooden spoon always on medium heat, mix for about 10 minutes until the mixture becomes a mass, like the semolina halva.
At the end, it has to be removed from the walls and the base of the pot.
Empty the mass of almonds in a tray or in a shallow baking pan, so that it has a large surface and let it cool slightly so that we can mold the almonds of Sifnos.
With a spoon, take spoonfuls of the mixture and add them to a nonstick paper. Thus, all almonds will become equally large.
After finishing with all the mixture, dip your hands in the flowerwater and make the almonds in a conical shape with the edge a little wider (like rounded buns as in the photo).

With the small finger, we open a puddle in the wide spot of the sweet. After finishing all the almonds, dip them in a lot of crystalline sugar and add them to anti-stick paper. Let them dry completely.
They have been kept out of the refrigerator for too long in airtight boxes.
